title: 「Gerund 作主語句」
titleZh: 「Gerund 作主語」把活動變成句子主題
titleEn: Using a gerund phrase as the sentence subject

formulas.labelZh: 動名詞詞組作句子主語

formulas.formula: Gerund phrase + modal verb + ordinary verb

example: Reading books takes a lot of time.
exampleZh: 閱讀書籍需要花很多時間。

examples.en: Reading books takes a lot of time.
examples.zh: 閱讀書籍需要花很多時間。

meaning.zh: 整個 V-ing 詞組代表一項活動並充當句子主語；後面的完整述語可以是形容詞、名詞詞組、一般動詞或情態動詞結構。

rules.en: The entire gerund phrase represents an activity and serves as the subject.
rules.zh: 整個 Gerund 詞組代表一項活動並充當句子主語。
examples: Reading books takes a lot of time.

rules.en: A gerund subject may take many kinds of predicates.
rules.zh: Gerund 主語後面不一定是形容詞，可以接名詞詞組、一般動詞或情態動詞。

rules.en: One activity normally takes a singular verb.
rules.zh: 一個 Gerund 詞組通常視為一項活動，因此使用單數動詞。

rules.en: Tense and modality are shown by the predicate.
rules.zh: Gerund 主語本身不表示時態；時態和情態由後面的動詞顯示。
examples: Walking to work saved me money.

rules.en: Keep all essential information after the gerund.
rules.zh: 必須保留 Gerund 後面界定活動的必要資料。
examples: Crossing this busy road is dangerous.

rules.en: Use not before the gerund phrase for a negative activity.
rules.zh: 否定形式使用 Not＋Gerund 詞組。
examples: Not reading the instructions can cause problems.

rules.en: Not every -ing form is a gerund subject.
rules.zh: 並非所有 -ing 形式都是 Gerund 主語；本課要求把 Gerund 詞組放在句首作主語。

rules.en: Two independent activities normally take a plural verb.
rules.zh: 兩項獨立活動通常使用複數動詞；本課主要集中一個 Gerund 詞組作主語。

benefits.en: It makes an activity the direct topic of the sentence.
benefits.zh: 它可以把活動直接變成句子主題。

benefits.en: It explains the result produced by an activity.
benefits.zh: 它不只評論活動，亦可說明活動會產生甚麼結果。

benefits.en: It expresses the time, money or conditions an activity requires.
benefits.zh: 它可說明一項活動所需的時間、金錢或條件。

benefits.en: It adds variety to sentence openings.
benefits.zh: 它提供有別於 It is、If you 和 When you 的自然句子開頭。

benefits.en: It suits general facts and practical advice.
benefits.zh: 它適合表達一般事實、生活道理、建議和說明。

benefits.en: It links a cause and its result in one sentence.
benefits.zh: 它能把一項活動及其結果直接連成一句。

en: Rewrite each sentence using a gerund phrase as the subject.
The predicate may contain an adjective, a noun phrase, an ordinary verb or a modal verb.
Preserve the original meaning, tense, modality and important details.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 Gerund 詞組作句子主語，改寫以下句子。
述語部分可以包含形容詞、名詞詞組、一般動詞或情態動詞。
保留原句意思、時態、情態和重要資料。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: It takes a lot of time to read books.
questions.promptZh: 閱讀書籍需要花很多時間。
questions.answer: Reading books takes a lot of time.
questions.answerZh: 閱讀書籍需要花很多時間。
